text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin seems to be in high spirits today!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Not really... I'm the same as usual.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm not some hotheaded idiot like Ticket. It's a
waste of energy to get all worked up.
